Competency probe: Compose connection-adjacent, response, body, attempt, job, and shutdown deadlines while retaining the first abort reason.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Timeout Signal model · Theory Timeout Signal, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Promise.race timeout code automatically cancels network work.
